calendar.matters:
Plaintiff The Regents Of The University Of California'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Oct-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ROBERT PERKISS, ESQ., COOK COLLECTION ATTORNEYS, 415.989.4730, FOR PLAINTIFF THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff The Regents Of The University Of California's Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Oct-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is to be heard at 9:30 am on the Law and Motion calendar. Rebecca Woodson, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar May-08-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Matthew Baron, Esq. appeared for plaintiff The Regents Of Univ. Of California
Matter added to the calendar per the Court.
No witnesses.

Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant NIS Solutions, Inc as follows:

Damages/Principal - $38,066.56
Prejudgment Interest - $1,301.42
Attorney's Fees - $12,500.00
Costs - $105.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $51,972.98

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
